The Second Book of the Ottoman Commentators Project Published

23.09.2022

The second book of the "Ottoman Commentators Project" conducted by Ibn Haldun University.

The second book of the "Ottoman Commentators Project" conducted by Ibn Haldun University Press has been published. Within the scope of the series, the work of Lutfullah b Muhammed el-Erzurûmî named "Râmûzü't-tahrir ve't-tafsîr" was prepared for publication in three volumes.

The work prepared by Bahaeddin Dartma can be obtained from distinguished bookstores and websites that sell books online.
